Interface TweetRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.reactive.ReactiveCrudRepository<Tweet,String>, org.springframework.data.mongodb.repository.ReactiveMongoRepository<Tweet,String>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.ReactiveQueryByExampleExecutor<Tweet>, org.springframework.data.repository.reactive.ReactiveSortingRepository<Tweet,String>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<Tweet,String>
@Repository public interface TweetRepository extends org.springframework.data.mongodb.repository.ReactiveMongoRepository<Tweet,String>
